overall.description: First-person perspective of a person walking through a dense forest at night, using a flashlight or headlamp to illuminate the narrow dirt trail ahead. The footage shows continuous forward movement between tall trees with no other people or vehicles present.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow forest path at night, illuminating the trail ahead with a flashlight or headlamp

entered.detail: tall tree trunk visible on the left side of the path, illuminated by the warm flashlight beam
tall tree trunk visible on the right side of the path
narrow dirt trail covered with leaves and small debris, winding through the dense forest
dense low vegetation, bushes, and saplings lining both sides of the trail
dense overhead tree canopy completely blocking the sky, creating a dark tunnel-like atmosphere

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight beam. Tall trees line both sides of the path with thick underbrush visible in the light, while the canopy overhead blocks any view of the sky, creating an enclosed and isolated atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dense, nocturnal forest that maintains a sense of claustrophobic isolation. It begins with a warm flashlight beam cutting through the darkness to illuminate a narrow dirt trail. As the camera advances, the light reveals thick underbrush and towering trees that line both sides of the path. The scene remains enclosed as the heavy canopy overhead completely blocks the sky, deepening the feeling of solitude before the path continues further into the woods.
